top_signals.title: SpaceX stock falls 8%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
top_signals.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.

top_signals.title: Argentina Approves Dollar Borrowing Amid Multilateral Loan Talks
top_signals.summary: The Argentine government authorized up to $5 billion in new dollar-denominated borrowing as the country looks to secure funding backed by multilateral institutions ahead of upcoming debt payments.
